section.div: 🐍 Pythonista diving into the world of Rust 🦀 On a quest to craft the most elegant, performant and safe code 🚀

Escape the Underworld as Melinoë in Zagreus' Journey. Battle familiar foes and bosses using her unique abilities and weapons, meet Zagreus' old friends, and reconnect with your family's past - all integrated into the main game as if it was always there.
A DLL for forcing Discord to use a specified proxy (HTTP/SOCKS5) for TCP connections. Bypasses local restrictions on voice chats.
